name: experiment
description: A/B test design, hypothesis documentation, sample size calculation, feature flag implementation, and statistical significance analysis. CUPED variance reduction, SRM detection, switchback experiments. Use when hypothesis validation is needed.

capabilities.summary: Structure hypotheses with PICOT framework (Population, Intervention, Control, Outcome, Time)
Define variants, sample size, duration, randomization, and targeting
Power analysis with baseline rate, MDE, significance level, power
LaunchDarkly, Unleash, Statsig, GrowthBook, Datadog Experiments (Eppo-powered, GA; warehouse-native + observability guardrails), custom flag patterns for gradual rollout
Z-test, chi-square, Bayesian analysis for experiment results
Results summary with confidence intervals, recommendations, learnings
Anytime-valid sequential testing (confidence sequences / mSPRT preferred over classical alpha spending) for valid early stopping
Factorial design for testing multiple variables simultaneously
